# Mini Game Collection

> A collection of browser-based mini games built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, playable at https://game.wookingwoo.com

All games run directly in the browser with no installation or login required. The main page provides a searchable, category-filtered game launcher that loads each game inside an iframe.

## Action Games

- [Dodge the Poop](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/dodge-the-poop/): Avoid falling objects and survive as long as possible
- [Cross the Road](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/cross-the-road/): Help a character cross busy roads safely
- [Crossy Road Classic](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/crossy_road/crossy_road.html): Original endless road-crossing adventure
- [Apple Catch](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/apple-catch/): Catch falling apples with a basket
- [Underwater Dash](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/underwater-dash/): Swim a clownfish over coral reefs in this underwater runner
- [Snake](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/snake/): Classic snake game with neon visuals and difficulty selection
- [Archery](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/archery/): Draw a bow and hit targets with precision
- [Shooting Gallery](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/shooting-gallery/): Arcade-style target shooting game
- [Rock Paper Scissors](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/rock-paper-scissors/): Challenge the AI in the classic game
- [Slot Machine](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/slot-machine/): Classic casino slot machine with spinning reels and jackpot rewards
- [Flappy Bird](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/flappy-bird/): Fly through pipes by tapping to flap and survive
- [Breakout](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/breakout/): Break all the bricks with your ball and paddle
- [Whack-a-Mole](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/whack-a-mole/): Whack the moles as they pop up, avoid the bombs
- [Fruit Ninja](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/fruit-ninja/): Slice fruits by swiping, avoid the bombs
- [Coin Flip](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/coin-flip/): Flip a coin and bet on heads or tails
- [Dice Roll](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/dice-roll/): Roll dice and bet on the outcome

## Puzzle Games

- [Memory Match](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/memory-match/): Flip cards and find all matching pairs
- [Typing Speed Race](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/typing-speed-race/): Test typing speed and accuracy under time pressure
- [Tetris](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/tetris/): Stack falling blocks and clear lines
- [2048](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/2048/): Combine numbered tiles to reach 2048
- [Minesweeper](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/minesweeper/): Classic minesweeper with 3 difficulty levels
- [Sudoku](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/sudoku/): Fill the 9x9 grid with numbers 1-9
- [Reaction Time](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/reaction-time/): Test your reaction speed when the screen turns green
- [Color Match](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/color-match/): Match the color of the text, not the word (Stroop test)
- [Simon Says](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/simon-says/): Memory game - watch the pattern and repeat it
- [Number Guessing](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/number-guessing/): Guess the number between 1-100 (Up and Down game)
- [Hangman](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/hangman/): Guess the word before the hangman is complete
- [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/tic-tac-toe/): Classic 3x3 game with AI opponent

## Creative / Music

- [Pixel Painter](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/pixel-painter/): Draw retro-style pixel art on a grid canvas
- [Virtual Drum Kit](https://game.wookingwoo.com/games/virtual-drum-kit/): Play drums with keyboard or mouse; supports recording and playback

## Developer

- Name: wookingwoo
- Email: contact@wookingwoo.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/wookingwoo/web_game
- Site: https://game.wookingwoo.com
